lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਉਸਾਰੇ ਸੋ ਢਾਹਸੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jo usaare so dtaahasee tis bin avar na koe |
lines.english: He who builds, also demolishes; there is no other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੇਵਸਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin naam deea tis sevasaa tis balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I serve the One who gave me the Naam; I am a sacrifice to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੰਮੑਲਾ ਤਾ ਤਨਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee tis samalaa taa tan dookh na hoe |31|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I contemplate Him, and then my body does not suffer in pain. ||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਣਾ ਕੋ ਮੇਰਾ ਕਿਸੁ ਗਹੀ ਣਾ ਕੋ ਹੋਆ ਨ ਹੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa ko meraa kis gahee naa ko hoaa na hog |
lines.english: No one is mine - whose gown should I grasp and hold? No one ever was, and no one shall ever be mine.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣਿ ਜਾਣਿ ਵਿਗੁਚੀਐ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਵਿਆਪੈ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan vigucheeai dubidhaa viaapai rog |
lines.english: Coming and going, one is ruined, afflicted with the disease of dual-mindedness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਣਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੇ ਆਦਮੀ ਕਲਰ ਕੰਧ ਗਿਰੰਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam vihoone aadamee kalar kandh girant |
lines.english: Those beings who lack the Naam, the Name of the Lord, collapse like pillars of salt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕਿਉ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਜਾਇ ਰਸਾਤਲਿ ਅੰਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai kiau chhootteeai jaae rasaatal ant |
lines.english: Without the Name, how can they find release? They fall into hell in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੀ ਮਤਿਹੀਣੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: agiaanee matiheen hai gur bin giaan na hoe |
lines.english: The ignorant lack understanding. Without the Guru, there is no spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣਤ ਗਣਾਵੈ ਅਖਰੀ ਅਗਣਤੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ganat ganaavai akharee aganat saachaa soe |
lines.english: Using a limited number of words, we describe the unlimited True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਮੇਲੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਿ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: vichhurriaa melai prabhoo naanak kar sanjog |32|
lines.english: God unites the separated souls with Himself, awakening their destiny. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂਟੀ ਤੰਤੁ ਰਬਾਬ ਕੀ ਵਾਜੈ ਨਹੀ ਵਿਜੋਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: toottee tant rabaab kee vaajai nahee vijog |
lines.english: The separated soul is like the broken string of a guitar, which does not vibrate its sound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਤੁ ਚੁਗਹਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਏਕਸੇ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਫਾਸ ਨ ਰੰਚ ॥
lines.translit: tat chugeh mil ekase tin kau faas na ranch |
lines.english: They peck at the essence of reality, and merge with the One Lord. They are never trapped at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰਵਰੁ ਕਾਇਆ ਪੰਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਤਰਵਰਿ ਪੰਖੀ ਪੰਚ ॥
lines.translit: taravar kaaeaa pankh man taravar pankhee panch |
lines.english: The body is the tree, and the mind is the bird; the birds in the tree are the five senses.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਖ ਤੁਟੇ ਫਾਹੀ ਪੜੀ ਅਵਗੁਣਿ ਭੀੜ ਬਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: pankh tutte faahee parree avagun bheerr banee |
lines.english: Their feathers are clipped, and they are caught in the noose; through their mistakes, they are caught in disaster.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਡਹਿ ਤ ਬੇਗੁਲ ਬੇਗੁਲੇ ਤਾਕਹਿ ਚੋਗ ਘਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: auddeh ta begul begule taakeh chog ghanee |
lines.english: But the others fly away in a hurry, when they see the food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਛਡਾਏ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਵਡਾ ਆਪਿ ਧਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aap chhaddaae chhootteeai vaddaa aap dhanee |
lines.english: When He Himself releases them, only then are they released. He Himself is the Great Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee chhootteeai kirapaa aap karee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, they are released, when He Himself grants His Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਾਚੇ ਕਿਉ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin saache kiau chhootteeai har gun karam manee |
lines.english: Without the True Lord, how can anyone find release? The jewel of the Lord's Glorious Praises comes by the karma of good actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣੈ ਹਾਥਿ ਵਡਾਈਆ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: apanai haath vaddaaeea jai bhaavai tai dee |33|
lines.english: Glorious greatness rests in His Hands. He blesses those with whom He is pleased. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਰ ਥਰ ਕੰਪੈ ਜੀਅੜਾ ਥਾਨ ਵਿਹੂਣਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: thar thar kanpai jeearraa thaan vihoonaa hoe |
lines.english: The soul trembles and shakes, when it loses its mooring and support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਥਿਰੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: thir naaraaein thir guroo thir saachaa beechaar |
lines.english: The Lord is eternal and forever stable; the Guru is stable, and contemplation upon the True Lord is stable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨਿ ਮਾਨਿ ਸਚੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਕਾਜੁ ਨ ਫੀਟੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: thaan maan sach ek hai kaaj na feettai koe |
lines.english: Only the support of the True Lord brings honor and glory. Through it, one's works are never in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਾ ਤਹ ਏਕੁ ਤੂ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhaa teh ek too ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there I see You, Lord; You have no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬੇ ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰੀ ਤੂ ਦਾਤਾ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sarabe thaan thanantaree too daataa daataar |
lines.english: In all places and interspaces, You are the Giver, the Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਨਾਥਹ ਨਾਥੁ ਤੂ ਨਿਧਾਰਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar naathah naath too nidhaaraa aadhaar |
lines.english: O Lord and Master of angels, men and Yogic masters, You are the support of the unsupported.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਣਮੰਗਿਆ ਦਾਨੁ ਦੇਵਸੀ ਵਡਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: anamangiaa daan devasee vaddaa agam apaar |34|
lines.english: You give gifts even when they are not asked for; You are great, inaccessible and infinite. ||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar rav rahiaa gurasabadee veechaar |
lines.english: You are pervading and permeating the places and interspaces; reflecting upon the Word of the Guru's Shabad, You are found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਢਾਹਿ ਉਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: deaa kareh prabh mel laihi khin meh dtaeh usaar |
lines.english: Please shower Your Mercy upon me, O God, and unite me with Yourself. In an instant, You destroy and rebuild.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਦਾਨੁ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਤੂ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: deaa daan deaal too kar kar dekhanahaar |
lines.english: O Merciful Lord, You are the embodiment of mercy; creating the Creation, You behold it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਲਦ ਭੰਜਨ ਦੁਖ ਦਲਣ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: daalad bhanjan dukh dalan guramukh giaan dhiaan |35|
lines.english: He is the Eradicator of poverty, and the Destroyer of pain; the Gurmukh realizes spiritual wisdom and meditation. ||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਨਾ ਤੂ ਬੀਨਾ ਤੁਹੀ ਦਾਨਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: daanaa too beenaa tuhee daanaa kai sir daan |
lines.english: You are all-wise and all-seeing; You are the Greatest Giver of all givers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਗਇਐ ਬਹਿ ਝੂਰੀਐ ਧਨ ਮਹਿ ਚੀਤੁ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: dhan geiai beh jhooreeai dhan meh cheet gavaar |
lines.english: Losing his wealth, he cries out in anguish; the fool's consciousness is engrossed in wealth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਵਿਰਲੀ ਸਚੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dhan viralee sach sanchiaa niramal naam piaar |
lines.english: How rare are those who gather the wealth of Truth, and love the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਸਿਰੁ ਸਉਪੀਐ ਭੀ ਕਰਤੇ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ॥
lines.translit: man deejai sir saupeeai bhee karate kee ttek |
lines.english: Dedicate your mind, and surrender your head; seek only the Support of the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਗਇਆ ਤਾ ਜਾਣ ਦੇਹਿ ਜੇ ਰਾਚਹਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਏਕ ॥
lines.translit: dhan geaa taa jaan dehi je raacheh rang ek |
lines.english: If by losing your wealth, you may become absorbed in the Love of the One Lord, then just let it go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਜਨ ਤੇ ਸਾਜਨ ਭਏ ਭੇਟੇ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: durajan te saajan bhe bhette gur govind |
lines.english: Even one's enemies become friends, meeting with the Guru, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਧਾਵਤ ਰਹਿ ਗਏ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਨੰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa dhaavat reh ge man meh sabad anand |
lines.english: Worldly affairs and wanderings cease, when the mind is filled with the bliss of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੀ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਿਵਾਰਿ ॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: satigur melee mil rahee janam maran dukh nivaar |36|
lines.english: United by the True Guru, you shall remain united, and the pains of birth and death will be ended. ||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨੁ ਬਨੁ ਫਿਰਤੀ ਢੂਢਤੀ ਬਸਤੁ ਰਹੀ ਘਰਿ ਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: ban ban firatee dtoodtatee basat rahee ghar baar |
lines.english: Wandering from forest to forest searching, you will find that those things are within the home of your own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਏਹੁ ਨ ਓਹੁ ਹੈ ਅਵਗੁਣਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਛੁਤਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis ehu na ohu hai avagun fir pachhutaeh |
lines.english: One will not have this world or the next; committing sinful mistakes, one comes to regret and repent in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਾ ਕਰਤ ਨ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਗੁਣ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanaa karat na chhootteeai vin gun jam pur jaeh |
lines.english: Through various rituals, one does not find release. Without virtue, one is sent to the City of Death.
